title: Are We A Family of Nepotism? | #shorts
full_text: People get upset with the tag of nepotism when it feels like somebody just came in and took the top job >> cuz half the battle in most of these situations is getting the opportunity, right? People are fighting for the opportunity to get an interview. You're fighting for the opportunity to get a promotion. You know, you're competing in these pools of people so that you can eventually get there. I'm asking the question whether you know if you were born in a business family in a business that's already established and as a career you chose to be part of that business that's already established either to further grow it or to manage it or to maintain it is that nepotistic >> that in my opinion is nepotism >> but if somebody were to call me a nepo baby which I actually have been called I don't take any offense >> who calls you a nepo baby we >> there's been multiple people at school have called me a nepo baby baby as well. >> Have I been called a Nepo husband?
